content: Initial non-severe CDI: fidaxomicin 200mg BID x10 days (preferred, lower recurrence) or vancomycin 125mg QID x10 days; metronidazole 500mg TID x10 days only if others unavailable. Severe CDI (WBC ≥15,000 or creatinine ≥1.5x baseline): fidaxomicin or vancomycin. Fulminant CDI (hypotension, shock, ileus, megacolon): vancomycin 500mg QID orally/NG + metronidazole 500mg IV q8h; consider rectal vancomycin if ileus. First recurrence: fidaxomicin (if not used initially) or vancomycin taper/pulse regimen. Multiple recurrences: fidaxomicin, vancomycin taper, or bezlotoxumab (monoclonal antibody against toxin B) added to antibiotics. Fecal microbiota transplantation (FMT) for ≥3 recurrences or 2 recurrences requiring hospitalization; ~85-90% efficacy. Rebiotix (fecal microbiota suspension) and Vowst (fecal spores) FDA-approved for recurrence prevention.
